connectionLaunchFlow.statusPanelUpdate: Show connection, model load, session, diagnostics, and readiness rows.

connectionLaunchFlow.launcherAction: Record the selected target as status data only.
connectionLaunchFlow.statusPanelUpdate: Move target selection from placeholder to configured in a future implementation.
connectionLaunchFlow.userAction: Select a KV260-class target when configuration exists.

connectionLaunchFlow.launcherAction: Use reviewed read-only discovery paths when implemented.
connectionLaunchFlow.statusPanelUpdate: Report detected, missing, or not configured discovery state.

connectionLaunchFlow.launcherAction: Check only whether required inputs are present.
connectionLaunchFlow.statusPanelUpdate: Report authentication as not configured, configured, or blocked.
connectionLaunchFlow.userAction: Provide target access details through a future explicit settings surface.

connectionLaunchFlow.launcherAction: Read local readiness data and keep launch controls gated.
connectionLaunchFlow.statusPanelUpdate: Show runtime, bitstream, board-smoke, and measurement blockers.
connectionLaunchFlow.userAction: Review readiness blockers before launch controls are enabled.

connectionLaunchFlow.launcherAction: Show the dry-run launch preview only.
connectionLaunchFlow.statusPanelUpdate: Keep the session inactive and logs not started.

connectionLaunchFlow.launcherAction: Refuse runtime start while evidence is missing.
connectionLaunchFlow.statusPanelUpdate: Keep runtime and session states blocked or inactive.
connectionLaunchFlow.userAction: Start runtime only after the readiness gate changes.

connectionLaunchFlow.launcherAction: Do not stream logs when no session exists.
connectionLaunchFlow.statusPanelUpdate: Show log stream as not started.
connectionLaunchFlow.userAction: Inspect logs after a real session exists.

discoveryPaths.suggestedUserAction: Connect the KV260 carrier-board USB path and rerun the status panel check.
discoveryPaths.summary: Read-only USB and serial enumeration can provide a local device hint.

discoveryPaths.suggestedUserAction: Configure the target host through a future explicit settings surface.
discoveryPaths.summary: A network target must be provided explicitly; the launcher does not scan networks.

discoveryPaths.suggestedUserAction: Use read-only enumeration until a reviewed serial boundary exists.
discoveryPaths.summary: Serial-console interaction is a future explicit target path, not active in this fixture.

errorTaxonomy.claimBoundary: No runtime or performance claim follows from discovery status.
errorTaxonomy.suggestedRemediation: Check power, cabling, and the selected discovery path, then rerun a read-only status refresh.
errorTaxonomy.userMessage: No KV260 target is visible to the configured discovery path.

errorTaxonomy.claimBoundary: The launcher must not guess hosts, scan networks, or print access inputs.
errorTaxonomy.suggestedRemediation: Configure the target host and access method through a future explicit settings surface.
errorTaxonomy.userMessage: Target access inputs are not configured.

errorTaxonomy.claimBoundary: No login attempt is performed by this status surface.
errorTaxonomy.suggestedRemediation: Keep connection controls disabled until the authentication boundary is implemented and tested.
errorTaxonomy.userMessage: The reviewed authentication handshake is not implemented in this fixture.

errorTaxonomy.claimBoundary: The target remains blocked and not evidence-backed.
errorTaxonomy.suggestedRemediation: Wait for checked runtime evidence before enabling start controls.
errorTaxonomy.userMessage: Runtime evidence is missing for the KV260 target path.

errorTaxonomy.claimBoundary: No model is loaded or referenced by local path.
errorTaxonomy.suggestedRemediation: Keep model asset selection explicit and outside repository fixtures.
errorTaxonomy.userMessage: Model assets are external and not configured by the launcher fixture.

errorTaxonomy.claimBoundary: No bitstream or board-smoke success is claimed here.
errorTaxonomy.suggestedRemediation: Keep launch controls gated until lower-layer evidence is available.
errorTaxonomy.userMessage: Bitstream and board-smoke evidence are missing for the launch path.

errorTaxonomy.claimBoundary: The launcher does not execute pccx-lab for this status surface.
errorTaxonomy.suggestedRemediation: Use the explicit pccx-lab CLI/core validator when that integration is requested.
errorTaxonomy.userMessage: pccx-lab diagnostics are represented as a read-only placeholder handoff.

errorTaxonomy.suggestedRemediation: Show session controls as disabled until the readiness gate changes.

errorTaxonomy.claimBoundary: No runtime logs are produced or collected.
errorTaxonomy.suggestedRemediation: Show logs as pending rather than empty success.
errorTaxonomy.userMessage: No log stream exists because no runtime session exists.

limitations: Data-only status panel fixture; no runtime is executed.
No USB, serial, network, SSH, or authentication command is run by this contract.
No model assets are bundled, loaded, or referenced by path.
No KV260 hardware access, board programming, runtime start, provider call, telemetry, upload, or write-back is performed.
The connection and launch flow is a gated plan until checked readiness evidence exists.
This is not a release, tag, versioned compatibility commitment, MCP, LSP, IDE, marketplace, or telemetry implementation.

statusPanel.label: device connection
statusPanel.nextAction: Run a read-only status check after a target is explicitly configured.
statusPanel.summary: No KV260 target connection is configured by this fixture.

statusPanel.label: model load
statusPanel.nextAction: Keep model assets external until runtime evidence exists.
statusPanel.summary: Gemma 3N E4B is a target descriptor only; no model assets are loaded.

statusPanel.label: session activity
statusPanel.nextAction: Keep launch controls gated until readiness inputs are present.
statusPanel.summary: No launcher session is active and no log stream has started.

statusPanel.label: pccx-lab diagnostics
statusPanel.nextAction: Use the pccx-lab CLI/core boundary later for validation, not launcher internals.
statusPanel.summary: Diagnostics handoff is represented as read-only local data only.

statusPanel.label: runtime readiness
statusPanel.nextAction: Do not present the launch path as available until evidence-backed readiness changes.
statusPanel.summary: Runtime, bitstream, board-smoke, and measurement evidence are still required.
